name: Tepeyollotl
description: Tepeyollotl, whose name translates to 'Heart of the Mountain' in Nahuatl, is a significant Aztec deity associated with the earth, earthquakes, echoes, jaguars, and the interior of mountains. He represents the essence and spirit residing within the mountainous landscapes that were central to Aztec cosmology. As the god of earthquakes, Tepeyollotl embodies the raw power and unpredictable nature of the earth's movements. The roars and echoes emanating from within caves and mountains were believed to be his voice, further solidifying his connection to these geological formations. He is often depicted as a jaguar, a powerful and stealthy creature symbolizing the earth's strength and hidden depths. Tepeyollotl is also linked to the underworld and the night, reflecting the darkness and mystery associated with the earth's interior. He is considered one of the nine Lords of the Night, further emphasizing his chthonic nature. Offerings and rituals were performed to appease Tepeyollotl and prevent destructive earthquakes, demonstrating the Aztec's respect for the earth's power and the importance of maintaining balance within the natural world. His influence extended to music and dance, as the sounds of drums and rattles were believed to invoke his presence and connect the human world with the earth's spirit. Tepeyollotl’s role as a protector of seeds and growing things within the earth gives him agricultural significance, linking him to the sustenance and fertility of the land.
subtitle: Heart of the Mountain, Jaguar God

keyMyths.title: Tepeyollotl's Roar
keyMyths.description: The echoes and roars heard from within mountains were believed to be Tepeyollotl's voice, a sign of his presence and power. It was both a warning and a reminder of the earth's strength.

keyMyths.title: The Jaguar's Earthly Power
keyMyths.description: Tepeyollotl's jaguar form embodies the earth's strength and stealth, representing the hidden forces that lie beneath the surface. This connection makes him a formidable deity.

keyMyths.title: Lord of the Night
keyMyths.description: As one of the Lords of the Night, Tepeyollotl governs the darkness and mystery associated with the underworld and the earth's interior. He holds dominion over this realm.
